description: A Vietnamese noodle soup built around a fragrant broth, rice noodles, herbs, and usually beef or chicken. It is commonly served with fresh garnishes and condiments on the side.
core_ingredients: Aromatics such as onion and ginger
preparation_steps: Prepare or simmer the broth with aromatics and spices until flavorful.
Cook or soak the rice noodles as needed.
Place noodles in a bowl and add sliced meat or other protein if using.
Serve with herbs, sprouts, lime, and condiments on the side.

health_advice.benefits: Can be lighter than many noodle dishes and often includes herbs and a broth-based base.
health_advice.risks: Sodium may be high, especially in restaurant broths and when extra sauces are added.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use plenty of herbs and vegetables, and go easy on high-sodium condiments.

dietary_notes.note: Rice noodles are usually gluten-free, but sauces and broth ingredients should still be checked.

allergens: Soy if soy-based condiments are used
Possible gluten in some added sauces
